tasks.subject: Task 0: Project Setup
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Working Vite project with Vitest, all dependencies installed.

**Files:**
- Create: `package.json`
- Create: `vite.config.js`
- Create: `index.html`
- Create: `src/main.js`

**Verify:** `npm run test` → `No test files found` (exit 0)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["package.json", "vite.config.js", "index.html", "src/main.js"], "verifyCommand": "npm run test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["npm run dev starts on localhost:5173", "npm run test exits 0", "npm run build produces dist/"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Size Analyzer
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure function classifying file size with status and recommendations.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/size-analyzer.js`
- Create: `src/__tests__/size-analyzer.test.js`

**Verify:** `npm run test src/__tests__/size-analyzer.test.js` → 3 tests pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/size-analyzer.js", "src/__tests__/size-analyzer.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npm run test src/__tests__/size-analyzer.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["green < 500KB", "yellow 500KB-2MB", "red > 2MB with 3 recommendations"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Markdown Generator
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure function converting PageData[] to clean Markdown string.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/markdown-generator.js`
- Create: `src/__tests__/markdown-generator.test.js`

**Verify:** `npm run test src/__tests__/markdown-generator.test.js` → 11 tests pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/markdown-generator.js", "src/__tests__/markdown-generator.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npm run test src/__tests__/markdown-generator.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["heading detection", "bullet/ordered list", "monospace code blocks", "header/footer removal", "page breaks", "image embedding"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: PDF Extractor
tasks.description:
**Goal:** PDF.js wrapper extracting text items and images per page.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/pdf-extractor.js`
- Create: `src/__tests__/pdf-extractor.test.js`

**Verify:** `npm run test src/__tests__/pdf-extractor.test.js` → all tests pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/pdf-extractor.js", "src/__tests__/pdf-extractor.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npm run test src/__tests__/pdf-extractor.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["loadPDF returns doc and numPages", "PASSWORD_REQUIRED thrown", "extractPage correct shape", "corrupt pages handled"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: OCR Engine
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Lazy-loaded Tesseract.js wrapper — worker created only on first use.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/ocr-engine.js`
- Create: `src/__tests__/ocr-engine.test.js`

**Verify:** `npm run test src/__tests__/ocr-engine.test.js` → all tests pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/ocr-engine.js", "src/__tests__/ocr-engine.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npm run test src/__tests__/ocr-engine.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["lazy initialization", "worker reuse", "OCR_UNAVAILABLE on failure", "teardown works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Conversion Pipeline
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Orchestrates extraction + OCR + generation with progress callbacks.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/pipeline.js`
- Create: `src/__tests__/pipeline.test.js`

**Verify:** `npm run test src/__tests__/pipeline.test.js` → all tests pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/pipeline.js", "src/__tests__/pipeline.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npm run test src/__tests__/pipeline.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["scanned page detection", "image OCR", "corrupt page placeholder", "page range option", "progress callbacks"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Exporter
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Download helpers for .md, ZIP, split pages, text-only.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/exporter.js`
- Create: `src/__tests__/exporter.test.js`

**Verify:** `npm run test src/__tests__/exporter.test.js` → all tests pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/exporter.js", "src/__tests__/exporter.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npm run test src/__tests__/exporter.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["downloadMarkdown works", "stripImages removes image lines", "downloadZip creates ZIP"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Styling
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Complete CSS for all UI sections.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/style.css`

**Verify:** `npm run dev` → http://localhost:5173 → all sections styled.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/style.css"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["drop zone styled", "size indicator colors", "progress bar transition", "responsive layout"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Upload UI Module
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Drop zone, file picker, password handling, page range, convert button.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/ui/upload.js`

**Verify:** Manual browser test.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/ui/upload.js"], "verifyCommand": "manual browser test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["drag-drop works", "file info shown", "password prompt for protected PDFs", "page range for 100+ pages"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Progress UI Module
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Progress bar and status messages driven by onProgress callbacks.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/ui/progress.js`

**Verify:** Manual browser test.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/ui/progress.js"], "verifyCommand": "manual browser test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["progress bar updates", "status messages correct", "done state 100%"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Output UI + Main Wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Output section, ko-fi banner, full app wiring in main.js.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/ui/output.js`
- Modify: `src/main.js`

**Verify:** Manual browser test.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/ui/output.js", "src/main.js"], "verifyCommand": "manual browser test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["markdown preview renders", "copy works", "download buttons work", "ko-fi banner visible", "OCR error message shown"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Production Build Verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** npm run build succeeds; built app handles full conversion in preview.

**Files:**
- Modify: `vite.config.js` (only if build fails)

**Verify:** `npm run build && npm run preview` → manual conversion test.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["vite.config.js"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build && npm run preview", "acceptanceCriteria": ["build exits 0", "preview serves working app", "full conversion works in preview"]}
```
